name: Abstract_CreateAddress
title: Abstract_CreateAddress
description: Creates a pseudo address for a communication object endpoint if abstract binding is used. The address can be attached to an endpoint with SD_SetAddress. For abstract binding, the address of an endpoint actually does not contain more information than a name which can be retrieved again through Abstract_GetDisplayName.
The address is necessary for implementation of service discovery; e.g. in the handlers on SD_consumer_discovered and on SD_provider_discovered, the address is passed as a selector.

parameters.name: co
parameters.description: Communication object (usually a service) for which the address shall be created.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Name for the address (e.g. the name of the endpoint).

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
